title: Close repository-level startup gaps
intent: Make Cube and Pi configurations, package pinning, API TLS, token semantics, hardware-only preflight, and flash planning explicit without starting cluster services.
proof_hooks: git diff --check; nix flake check --no-build --no-update-lock-file; nix develop --accept-flake-config -c ./scripts/validate-repo.sh; decapod validate
deferred_questions: Do not activate K3s or write Pi media until Day-0 physical verification and explicit startup approval.
